title: Synch a formula column with Jira

posts.author: ibanzatto (Ivan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, this is my first post over here… so pardon me if I make some mistake!
I’m trying to integrate Monday with Jira and two formula columns does not appear to connect.

Is there a way to integrate them? Those fields are essential for the integration.

Many thanks!

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

The formula column is not supported by the API.

You can see more info and workarounds on this post Mutation: create_column for a 'formula' type column - #8 by dipro

Hope this helps
